name: hcportal_regenerateExtApiKey
description: Regenerates the external API key (ExtApiKey) for a kennel. Requires the current API key to be provided for security verification. Only users with appropriate AppAccessFlags (0x40000019) can regenerate. Generates a 75-character cryptographically random key using CRYPT_GEN_RANDOM(150) and base64 encoding, with '+' and '/' characters stripped. The UPDATE is wrapped in a transaction. @publicKennelId changed from NVARCHAR(250) (HC5) to UNIQUEIDENTIFIER in HC6. @currentExtApiKey narrowed from NVARCHAR(1000) to NVARCHAR(120) to match Kennel.ExtApiKey.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: the user requesting key regeneration. Passed to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth and used for the AppAccessFlags authorization check.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: The kennel whose API key is being regenerated. Changed from NVARCHAR(250) in HC5 to UNIQUEIDENTIFIER in HC6. Validated IS NULL after auth. Kennel must exist.

parameters.name: currentExtApiKey
parameters.description: Security: the current external API key. Must exactly match Kennel.ExtApiKey for the resolved kennel. Narrowed from NVARCHAR(1000) in HC5 to NVARCHAR(120) in HC6 to match the table column.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned when the API key has been successfully regenerated.

columns.name: newExtApiKey
columns.description: The newly generated external API key. 75 characters, derived from LEFT(base64(CRYPT_GEN_RANDOM(150)), 75) with '+' and '/' stripped.

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Kennel.ExtApiKey — overwrites the existing API key with the newly generated value
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change the AppAccessFlags permission bitmask (0x40000019) without coordinating with all callers
